title: Recent Increase In Dry Bulk Spot Cargo Volume Last
section_path: Recent Increase In Dry Bulk Spot Cargo Volume Last
section_path_text: Recent Increase In Dry Bulk Spot Cargo Volume Last
summary:
Main
Last week's large declines in capesize and panamax rates exceeded most expectations, but more positive at least is that overall spot cargo volume increased by a large amount. 102 cargoes were reported in the spot market last week, which is 37 more than the previous week. Last week's spot cargo volume marked the largest amount seen since the Week Ending June 12th.
